schema.description: Whether to search for unconditional or conditional access.
Access modes required when accessKind is conditional. Repeat the parameter to provide multiple values.

anyOf.description: Access mode required before receiving the service.

items.description: Access mode required before receiving the service.

schema.description: Administrative statuses accepted or targeted by the service. Repeat the parameter to provide multiple values.
Whether the service is open to everyone or restricted to specific audiences.
Family situations accepted or targeted by the service. Repeat the parameter to provide multiple values.
Gender audiences accepted or targeted by the service. Repeat the parameter to provide multiple values.
Whether the service is specifically targeted to certain audiences.
Maximum supported age.
Minimum supported age.
Additional audience characteristics accepted or targeted by the service. Repeat the parameter to provide multiple values.
Category identifiers to include in the search. Each provided category automatically includes its descendant categories.

Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code format.
Used by country, administrative-division, and locality searches, and optional for point-radius searches.
Administrative code for the division, when available.
Human-readable name of the administrative division, when available.
Type of administrative division in the local country context.
Language in which the content should be returned. Format ISO 639-3.
Latitude in decimal degrees for point-radius search.
Maximum number of results returned per page.
Type of locality identifier. Used for locality search.
Value of the locality identifier.
Geographic search mode.
Longitude in decimal degrees for point-radius search.
Only return results that are open today.
Page number, starting at 1.
Free-text query applied to searchable content.
Search radius in kilometers for point-radius search.
Only return results updated after this date.
Only return results updated before this date.
Only return results updated on this date.

self.description: Link to the current page of results.

next.description: Link to the next page of results, if available.

prev.description: Link to the previous page of results, if available.

description.description: Localized HTML content describing the place.
description.example: A support center providing food distribution and social services.

slug.description: SEO-friendly unique slug for the place.

languages.description: Languages spoken at the place. Format ISO 639-3

label.description: Display label for this contact method.
Display label for this contact method.
Display label for this contact method.
Display label for this contact method.

platform.description: Social media platform name. Only present for social contacts.

label.description: Display label for this contact method.

value.description: Social media profile or page URL.

items.description: A contact method for the place or service.

contact.description: Contact methods available for the place.

isUnconditional.description: If true, access to the facility is unconditional and there are no requirements

isWheelchairAccessible.description: Whether the place is accessible to wheelchair

isPaid.description: Whether the place or service requires payment.

otherDetails.description: Additional free-text information related to access conditions.
otherDetails.example: Bring an ID document on your first visit.

access.description: Access rules applying to the place.

admissionPolicy.description: Whether the place or service is open to everyone or restricted to specific audiences.

isTargeted.description: Whether the place or service is designed for certain audiences, even if broad admission is open.

description.description: Free-text description of the intended or accepted audience.

ageRange.description: Age restriction. Null means there is no age restriction.

administrativeStatuses.description:
Accepted or targeted administrative statuses.
- regular: Person in regular situation. 
- asylum: Person in asylum. 
- refugee: Person with refugee status. 
- undocumente: Person without passport or ID.

familyStatuses.description:
Accepted or targeted family situations.
- isolated: Isolated person.
- family: Family.
- couple: Couple.
- pregnant: Pregnant Woman.

otherStatuses.description:
Other accepted or targeted statuses.
- violence: Person victim of violence.
- addiction: Person suffering from addition.
- disability: Person with disabilities.
- lgbt+: Person among LGBT+ communities.
- hiv: Person suffering from HIV.
- prostitution: Person suffering from prostitution.
- prison: Person getting out of prison.
- student: Student.

genders.description:
Accepted or targeted genders.
- men: Men.
- women: Women

key.description: Stable machine-readable identifier for the support context.

label.description: Human-readable label for the support context.
label.example: Support for displaced people from Ukraine

details.description: Additional details about the support available in this context.

items.description: Special support context related to a crisis or exceptional situation.

specialSupportContexts.description: Special support contexts such as crisis-specific support.

startDate.description: Start date and time of the temporary closure in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: End date and time of the temporary closure in ISO 8601 format.

closures.description: List of temporary closures affecting the place.

startDate.description: Start date and time of the temporary schedule adjustment in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: End date and time of the temporary schedule adjustment in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: Explanation of the temporary schedule adjustment.
description.example: Reduced opening hours during school holidays.

status.description: Opening status for a day or public holiday.

timeSlots.description: Opening time slots for this day. May be empty when status is closed or unknown.

items.description: Opening information for one day of the week.

status.description: Default public holiday behavior. Use "specific" when holiday-specific entries are provided.

label.description: Human-readable name of the public holiday.

status.description: Opening status for this public holiday.

timeSlots.description: Opening time slots for this holiday when applicable.

items.description: Specific opening rule for one public holiday.

schedule.description: Schedule applied during the temporary adjustment period.

scheduleAdjustments.description: List of temporary schedule changes affecting the place.

title.description: Short title of the temporary message.

startDate.description: Start date and time from which the message is active in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: End date and time until which the message is active in ISO 8601 format.

description.example: Bring an ID document on your first visit.

messages.description: List of temporary informational messages displayed for the place.

isOpenToday.description: Whether the place is open today.

updatedAt.description: Last update date and time of this place in ISO 8601 format.

type.description: Mobile or route-based service delivered across multiple locations according to a schedule.

description.description: Additional information about this stop or route point.

additionalInformation.description: Additional address details such as building, floor, or entrance.

countryCode.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

type.description: Type of administrative division in the local country context.

code.description: Administrative code for this division, when available.

name.description: Human-readable name of the administrative division.

administrativeDivisions.description: Country-specific administrative divisions associated with the place.

location.description: Location where the itinerary service is available for this stop.

status.description: Opening status for a day or public holiday.

timeSlots.description: Opening time slots for this day. May be empty when status is closed or unknown.

items.description: Opening information for one day of the week.

status.description: Default public holiday behavior. Use "specific" when holiday-specific entries are provided.

label.description: Human-readable name of the public holiday.

status.description: Opening status for this public holiday.

timeSlots.description: Opening time slots for this holiday when applicable.

items.description: Specific opening rule for one public holiday.

schedule.description: Schedule during which the itinerary service is available at this stop.

stops.description: Scheduled stops or route points where the itinerary service is available.

results.description: List of resources matching the search criteria. Each item can be either a fixed location or an itinerary depending on its "type".

totalResults.description: Total number of results matching the search criteria.

schema.description: Search response containing paginated results and navigation links.

info.title: Soliguide Search API
info.description: Static operation metadata from decorators with versioned payload schemas.
